info.title: OntoloSQL Designer Desktop API
info.description:
Versioned API for native desktop clients. Web SPA authentication remains Sanctum cookie/session based; this API uses Google OAuth with PKCE and expiring Sanctum bearer tokens.

Version 1.1.0 documents ontology value types in detail, including enum value types (a string base type with a `oneOf` constraint), and the visual-only schema markers used for reference tables, reference links, pipeline transforms, and table-level Foundry edit settings (`editsEnabled` / `editsHistory`).

get.description: Stores the PKCE request and redirects the system browser to Google OAuth.
Validates the Google account domain, creates a one-time desktop grant, and redirects to the configured native callback URI with code and state.

302.description: Redirect to native desktop callback URI

post.summary: Exchange one-time OAuth grant for bearer token

get.description: Requires abilities: desktop, tokens:manage. Plaintext tokens are never returned.

delete.summary: Revoke one of the current user's tokens

post.description: Requires abilities: desktop, presence:read. Writer channels also require presence:write in channel authorization.

get.summary: Get owned, shared, and public diagrams
Search users by email for sharing
get.description: Requires abilities: desktop, sharing:write. Query must be at least two characters to return matches.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated token lacks the required ability or diagram permission

Unauthorized.description: Missing, invalid, or expired bearer token

DiagramSchema.description:
Vue Flow schema elements (a flat list of nodes and edges). Nodes have a `type` of `table`, `row`, or `pipeline-transform`; edges have `source`/`target` referencing node ids.

Notable `data` fields: table nodes may carry `ontologyActions`, `editsEnabled` (boolean; Foundry object patches enabled) and `editsHistory` (`{ enabled, storeAllPreviousProperties }`), `titlePropertyRowId`, and `implementsInterfaces`. Row nodes carry `sqlType`, `keyMod`, `nullable`, `indexed`, `userEdits`, and `valueTypeId` (references a ValueType `id`).

Visual-only / reference elements are marked and excluded from SQL and Maker exports but preserved in backup JSON: reference tables (`data.tableKind = 'reference'`, `data.reference = true`), reference links (`data.linkKind = 'reference'`), pipeline transform nodes (`type = 'pipeline-transform'`), and transform edges (`type = 'transform'`, `data.linkKind = 'transform'`). Any element with `data.exportable = false` is visual-only.

Runtime-only keys such as hidden, selected, dimensions, and editing are not persisted and are stripped from save/load paths.

ValueType.description: Reusable ontology value type. Only available on `ontology` diagrams. Enum value types are modeled as a `string` base type carrying a single `oneOf` constraint.

id.description: Stable client identifier. Row schema items reference it via `data.valueTypeId`.

constraints.description: Validation constraints. Only string base types may define constraints.

ValueTypeConstraint.description: A value type validation constraint. Each constraint type may appear at most once per value type. `oneOf` represents an enum (a fixed set of allowed string values).

values.description: Allowed values for the `oneOf` (enum) constraint. Must contain at least one non-empty value.

usePartialMatch.description: `regex`: allow a partial match instead of a full-string match.
